name: i-dont-want-to-talk-about-it
description: Terrence Real's I Don't Want to Talk About It — men's mental health toolkit uncovering the hidden epidemic of covert male depression, how it manifests as anger, workaholism, addiction, and withdrawal, and the path to healing through emotional honesty and connection
useCase: Understand covert male depression, recognize the signs in yourself or loved ones, break the generational cycle, and find the path to healing
knownRisks: The book was published in 1997 — some cultural references and therapeutic approaches may have evolved
Real's framework is grounded in psychodynamic and relational therapy — not all therapists agree
The focus on men may feel exclusionary to women seeking help for their own depression
